style: warm near-black cinematic flat 2D story illustration; recurring cast; no text or border

assets.prompt: Create a cinematic flat 2D story illustration for a Vietnamese language-learning app. Scene: evening outside a welcoming multigenerational Vietnamese family home in Hanoi; Minh, a friendly Vietnamese man in his early thirties with short black hair and an indigo overshirt, arrives beside the learner, a Vietnamese-American young woman with shoulder-length black hair and a coral blouse; through the warm doorway we glimpse her mother Phương in a burnt-orange blouse and younger sister Phượng in a teal blouse greeting them. Consistent recurring cast, expressive natural gestures, culturally grounded contemporary Vietnam, warm near-black background, coral amber teal and violet palette, layered paper-cut shapes, soft theatrical lighting, clear focal hierarchy, generous breathing room for overlaid conversation bubbles. No text, no letters, no numbers, no speech bubbles, no border, no watermark.
